auth.session_code_hint: Save this code — it's your key to restore settings on any device.
auth.not_logged_in: Sign in to save complexes and settings across devices.
auth.email_code_label: Enter the 6-digit code from your email
auth.email_sent_hint: Check your inbox (and spam). The code is valid for 15 minutes.
auth.email_error_invalid: Incorrect or expired code. Please try again.
auth.email_error_too_many: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes.
auth.email_error_send_failed: Failed to send email. Please try again.
auth.email_guest_merge: Your saved data will be linked to this account.

complex.delete_confirm: Delete this complex? This cannot be undone.
complex.limit_reached: You've reached the free plan limit ({n} complexes). Upgrade to Premium for unlimited complexes.
complex.guest_limit: Guest limit reached ({n} complexes per browser/IP per 30 days). Sign in to create more.
complex.service_overload: Service is temporarily limiting guest creation. Please sign in to continue.
complex.publish_auth_body: Publishing complexes to the community requires an account. Sign in to share your work with others.

settings.title: Settings
settings.delete_account_confirm: This will permanently delete your account and all your complexes. Are you sure?

browse.new_from_complex: Create new complex with this as base

editor.canvas_empty: Canvas is empty — select a recipe from the list and click the graph icon
editor.canvas_hint: Ctrl+click = multi-select · Shift+drag = rubber-band · Ctrl+Shift+drag = additive
editor.dangling_body: These resources are not connected to any node. After saving they become external inputs/outputs.
editor.lcm_conflict_body: After connecting via LCM, the group would have more than one demand-satisfaction connector. Choose which one to keep, or cancel.
editor.lcm_one_idle: Only one resource can have a demand-satisfaction connector across the whole LCM group.
editor.lcm_cycle: Cannot enable LCM: the connections form a cycle with no consistent integer ratio solution.

guest.saved_body: Your complex is stored in your current session. Sign in to keep it across devices and protect it from being lost if you clear your cookies.

community.empty: No public complexes yet. Be the first!
community.fork_success: Copied! Open your new complex now?

errors.forbidden: You don't have permission to edit this complex.
errors.login_required: Please sign in to perform this action.

cascade.publish_body: This complex contains {n} private nested complex(es) that will also be published:
cascade.unpublish_body: This complex is used in {n} public complex(es) that will also be unpublished:
cascade.dep_warning: This complex is used in {n} other complex(es). Changes may affect them.
cascade.delete_deps_warning: This complex is used in {n} other complex(es):

subscriptions.unsubscribe_confirm: Remove this complex from your bookmarks?

cookie.banner_text: This site uses a strictly necessary session cookie for login — no tracking, no advertising.

ghost.edited_notice: This complex has been updated by its author.
ghost.privatized_notice: This complex is no longer public.
ghost.deleted_notice: This complex has been deleted by its author.
ghost.frozen_likes: Likes at the time of snapshot
ghost.view_notice_edited: You are viewing a frozen snapshot — the original has been updated by its author.
ghost.view_notice_privatized: You are viewing a frozen snapshot — the original is no longer public.
ghost.view_notice_deleted: You are viewing a frozen snapshot — the original has been deleted by its author.
